title: SkyBlock Enhanced – Legacy Edition
description: Improve your Hypixel SkyBlock experience with carefully selected mods in a one-click modpack. Enjoy a performance boost and convenient quality-of-life upgrades.
body:
![The Hypixel skyblock hub with Skyblock Enhanced text and a beautiful nath sky with saders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fea35eb599906e1f8610c669ca656371a4ff8fa.jpeg)

# END OF LIFE

This modpack is no longer maintained.

Hypixel will soon require Minecraft 1.21.5 or newer for SkyBlock. The 1.8.9 version will not receive any more updates or fixes.

Please switch to SkyBlock Enhanced – Modern Edition:
https://modrinth.com/project/e0oMrxjp

## SkyBlock Enhanced: Your All-in-One Modpack for Hypixel Skyblock!

SkyBlock Enhanced bundles essential mods to elevate your Hypixel Skyblock gameplay. Enjoy an easy, one-click installation for improved performance and helpful on-screen quality-of-life features.

---

### 🔔 Important Notes (Read Before Installing!)
-   📢 **Manual Optifine Installation Required:** For custom Skyblock textures and optimal performance, you **must** install Optifine separately.
-   📢 **Allocate Sufficient RAM:** Assign **at least 4GB of RAM** to Minecraft for smooth gameplay. 2GB will lead to stuttering and lag.
-   Enjoying the modpack? Show your appreciation on the [forum post](https://hypixel.net/threads/skyblock-enhanced-hypixel-a-pre-configerd-modpack-for-skyblock-version-1-8-9.5847134/page-2#post-40785731).

<details>
<summary>⚙️ Pre-configured for Optimal Performance</summary>

SkyBlock Enhanced features fine-tuned configurations for all included mods, ensuring they work together seamlessly and preventing on-screen clutter from overlapping GUIs.

**Automatic Configuration (Version 2.0+):**
PackCore manages settings for different screen resolutions (1440p and 1080p).
-   **First Launch:** You'll be prompted to select the best configuration for your screen.
-   **Resetting:** To reset, go to `PackCore Configs` in the main menu, enable `Show Default Config Dialog`, and restart. (**Warning:** This will overwrite your current settings!)

<details>
<summary>Configuration for Versions Before 2.0</summary>

-   **Default:** 1080p settings are applied initially.
-   **To Change (e.g., to 1440p):**
    1.  Go to `Settings`.
    2.  Click `Easy Configs` (bottom corner).
    3.  Click `Load Configs`.
    4.  Select `EasyConfigSave1` for 1440p (or `EasyConfigSave0` for 1080p).
    5.  Optionally, check `include mcOptions` for keybinds and video settings.
    6.  Click `Load` and restart the game.
</details>
</details>

<details>
<summary>✨ How to Install Optifine (Manual Installation Required)</summary>

Due to Optifine's licensing, it cannot be included in the modpack and must be installed manually. Optifine improves performance and enables custom Skyblock textures.

**Video Tutorial:** (Watch from 2:32)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Al6Bhe4kwhI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### 📝 Want a written tutorial read her.

<details>
<summary>How to install Optifine</summary>

1. Go to the Optfine website and download Optifine for 1.8.9. [Link to download.](https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=preview_OptiFine_1.8.9_HD_U_M6_pre2.jar)
3. When you have clicked the link you should be here. ![Opfine website with the download button in center](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb4a14c84367c5ef16c04b1682af5df4c0bf3b20.png)
4. Click download
5. When you have downloaded the file, can you find it in the Download folder in File Explorer.
   ![Showing where to click to open file explorer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f71672da8502ef938fdd0b2ca22d6b6e8d6ab2a1.png)
   ![Showing where to click to find downloads and the downloaded file.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d4a12dfeacf6019e46264e7e79e5c11612655b3.png)
6. Open the Modrinth app and locate the SkyBlock Enhanced installation.
   ![Showing the Skyblock Enhanced install location](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/081722347347e528cd6882db5699a1f5be007eac.png)
7. Then open the folder of the installation.
   ![Where to click to open the folder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15dragging40e9a24aad3e8f72cd740a7a1007b3bdee6a8e.png)
8. Locate the mods folder and open it.
   ![Where the mods folder is located](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5bb3a1e723ad35996f6dfd74e649267c03b15a6.png)
9. When opened copy the Optifine file over from the Download folder and into the mods folder that you just opened. This can be done by just left-clicking the optfine jar and holding it down until you are over the mods folder.
  ![Showing dragging the mod over to the mods folder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ef3238bc44900a4564652b85453550eca6fead5.png)
10. Open Modrinth, click play and have fun!

</details>

</details>


<details>
<summary>✨How to install</summary>

### If you need help with installing the modpack watch the video. Have questions comment on the video and I will help.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Al6Bhe4kwhI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### 📝Want a written tutorial read her.

Step 1 Download the Modrinth app (Tutorials for different lunchers will be added at a later point)
Step 2 Download the Skyblock Enhanced Mod Pack

<details>
<summary>How to install Modrinth app</summary>

1. Go to [https://modrinth.com/app](https://modrinth.com/app)
2. Click the Green button if on a Windows PC. 
  
![Picture of Green "Download" button.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/420d9afaf7cf0a49b4f8b5cfbcd5d77c001b9b54.png)

or click the "More Download Option" button if on another type of PC and find the correct one.

![Picture of A more Download button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f3dc489456ebdf3661cab4850159abe63fdc5e8.png)


3 When you have downloaded the installer, click it. 

![Picture of downloaded file](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc650af6fd52a283d69aaf9991b2ded6ab2e7cac.png)

If you can not see the downloaded file, open File Explorer.

   ![Image Showing where to click to open file explorer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f71672da8502ef938fdd0b2ca22d6b6e8d6ab2a1.png)
   ![Image Showing the downloaded file(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be3201ec68d5526da7a4e47fa75331b08854506a.png)

4 Now you will get a pop-up window, click next and then next, and then install.

- You will be asked if you want to let this app make changes, click YES.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c80c42c92f0e011b301fe0a46613da97ea3381f5.png)

![Image of installer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/876679de56f1bdecd95b56e63655dd5f8e4192a8.png)

- The installer will then open, click next until you reach this

![Image of installer finched](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3217ac26464a0589f59b09455580a13e34a616e.png)

- Then click finched and the app should open.

The tutorial from this point is outdated it should work but stuff can look different.
5 Now the app will open and you need to log in. Click Get Started then Sign in.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95fd8b5f043f51775e610c504fdbbba84413ac53.png)

A browser window will open and you can log in to your account there. 

It will first ask for a code that can be found in the app by clicking on it on the taskbar icon of the app.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71e502941185234b700fc116ff2f943513bee6f9.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c666955ce66e23b6d6b011a48b13c1a8fd60f15.png)

Then you will be asked for the email and password of the account. Your Minecraft account is a Microsoft account.

6 Now you will be asked to sign in to your Modrinth account you don't have to just click next.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d9cc0686c6964782b4224981a90c02f6a28fa66.png)

7 Now you will get a lot of prompts just click next.

8 Time so set the memory limit to Minecraft.

Click on the option down in the left corner of the app.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35ed823ba62aa1034fce0dda5366c0b79a36b9f0.png)

Then locate the memory limit slider, and set it to something between 2000mb and 4000mb depending on how much RAM you have. If you don't know how much ram you have, can you use 3000mb it is a safe amount.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40782762d5a44214790bc4d628d2d7f848225c3a.png)

Then you have to install JAVA. Find the button to install Java and click install recommended under the Java 8 version.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3daafcf992fe6096e95d8f2f4582baa222a90d50.png)

9 At this point are you ready to install any modpack you want. Check out the How to install SkyBlock Enhanced spoiler under for how to install the mod pack.

</details>


<details>
<summary>How to install SkyBlock Enhanced mod pack</summary>

1. Open the Modrinth app and locate the search button on the left side.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62cd60bedc9ecb7bae0a70d27340a27d980656e8.png)

2 Search SkyBlock Enhanced and click install. This can take some time so be pason.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6440f5796d343ee9f28d051fe4acf7e84221f7b.png)

3 Click the library button on the left side. 

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62cd60bedc9ecb7bae0a70d27340a27d980656e8.png)

4 You will find the modpack there and you can click the green button when hovering the mouse over it to start the game. Under the first start-up of the game you will get a pop-up asking for permission click YES. Remember you will have to install Optifine manually. Information on how to do that can be found above.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16c576ebb74138a48d39fdf751ca26cc80856d54.png)

</details>

### Don't want to use the Modrinth app 

<details>
<summary>How to install the modpack using the vanilla Minecraft launcher.</summary>

If you don't want to use the Modrinth app can you use the vanilla launcher but it will be more work and automatic updates will not happen.

- Step 1
Download Java. [It can be found here.](https://www.java.com/download/ie_manual.jsp)
Click the green button to download.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2d1f60c344bff3cd20f60f3471720892db109e6.png)

When you have downloaded it click the file you downloaded.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96151bb9c2ab356e67761bafc0537de0eeb9492c.png)

If it did not come up as a pop-up in the browser you can find it in the File Explorer and then Downloads.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35a36b27d4023f5693526d88f0aecb871ffcee5a.png)

When you have clicked it you will get a pop-up asking for permission Click YES.

After that, you will get a window asking you if you want to install it. Click Install.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80d228086c336e295c4e860a2f65660815bd4afc.png)

Now you will get a window confirming that it is installed. Click Close.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cec17a4503fabd30bf3f47d97b88e29cc0421353.png)

- Step 2

Install Forge for 1.8.9

Open the Minecraft launcher and open the game in 1.8.9 if you have not already done this.

How to find version 1.8.9 if you haven't already played it. Open the Launcher and go to the installation tab.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2213037c60d316bafc9b2f4f29bcb9b3345f8ca1.png)

Click new installation.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75216bf7ed1905a03bb52cba8778c2dccb3e2f2b.png)

Go to the version part search 1.8.9 and select that one.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38aedbf233b8ba07bb017b0c8c920b05694f804d.png)

Give it a name hit crate and then hit play. Let the game open for a few seconds in the main menu and close it.

Install Forge

Go the the Forge website and download the installer. [Find it her.](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.8.9.html)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac3f5179880e6272c64736d86387731370cc2bb7.png)

When you have downloaded it you can click it.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b426110fd90cb7e51dda2e30ffe9d8bd8dc64a82.png)

If you can not find it as a pop-up in the browser open File Explorer and go to downloads.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b483c34c769c29963cf640b847047bf6cd7f2e47.png)

When you click it this window should open.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bed0d7d23e6bb52982fd164e49ac38abcd16036.png)

Click OK.

Good, you have installed Forge.

- Step 3 

Make an installation folder for the modpack.

Hit the Windows button on your keyboard and write %appdata% then hit enter.

A File Explorer window should open. Right-click the empty space and find "new" and then "folder".

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0edcdbfd5cee3e93acce37859cd5aecc696507f3.png)

Give it a good name and then open it (remember the name). Have it in the background you will need it.

- Step 4 

Download the pack

Download the latest version from Modrinth.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9682e7d7096efa7897b5cd8eaf8a35661118186.png)

Then go to this [site.](https://jamie.codeberg.page/mrpack-to-zip/@master/)

Here you will convert the mrpack to a folder with mods.

Click Choose a file and then choose the file you downloaded. 

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34884cfdf43454eadd1b5fcd409cef9c17fb1023.png)

Now you can click Download it will start downloading a zip folder. Open the zip folder when finished.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a2c85813bdede19b82dfde124b2b8c593d6a9c0.png)

When you have opened it you can copy everything from that folder into the new one you made earlier. The easiest way to do this is to do Ctrl-A in the zip folder and then Ctrl-C. Then go to the new folder and do Ctrl-V. If every thing moved over is all good.

- Step 5

Make the game ready to play.

At this point, you can open up the Launcher again. Go to the installation tab and click New Installation.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2213037c60d316bafc9b2f4f29bcb9b3345f8ca1.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75216bf7ed1905a03bb52cba8778c2dccb3e2f2b.png)

Give it a good name and in the version field write forge, click the option that comes up.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fb8e27e275d71f7be117ec77d8691f110e121be.png)

In the game directory click Browse.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa65df2bd1d0b28ca4f9c005ac2978c9af9a0620.png)

Then find the folder you made and choose it.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/428081d40fb8843ff39c73a25b513ece3d707d5c.png)

Click OK. The More option toggle.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f51713ae4a83bcb1bb3dea1f00f273fccf70d1ba.png)

Change the JVM arguments line, only change the number 2 to a (3 or 4) depending on how much RAM you have 4 is safe for 99% of people.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1fac9c296e2a8006db28fe8ea2f46cf717ea29f.png)

Click Create then play.

- Step 6 

Install Optifine Follow the Tuorial on how to install optifine but when i say open the modrinth app and click the folder icon use the folder you created previously and locate the mods folder.

- Step 7

Have FUN!!!

Need help Write your problem under this post on YouTube. [YouTube post.](https://www.youtube.com/post/Ugkxmo9eVuxo3vgKtxynB_ACVitFCnb9bGaA)

To update just download the mrpack again and replace the content inside of the folder you created. You will get promoted that it is duplicate files just hit replace.

</details>

### Don't want to use Modrinth or the Vanilla launcher.

The modpack is transported in a .mrpack format and most launchers support it you can use MultiMC, Prism Launcher, ATLauncher, BakaXL, or Superpack to play my pack. I have not tested it so I don't know how to use it but it should be an import button where you can choose a .mrpcak file.

</details>

<details>
<summary>❗Important KeyBinds</summary>

## Config menu access with **Right shift**


### Importen HotKeys
All of them are configurable through the "**Right shift**" config menu just find the mod and then the HotKey you wish to change.

### NEU

- Shose a NPC to show a way point to "**U**"
- Slot Locking Key "**L**"
- Open price graph on item when hovering over the item "**P**"
- Quickly change to an armor set from the wardrobe. Slot 1 = Key "**1**" Slot 2 = Key "**2**" and so on.

### Skyhanni

- Move a GUI element by SkyHanni on screen "**G**"
- Warp Home on Garden "**Z**"
- Sethome on Garden "**H**"
- Warp to Barn on garden "**B**"
- Bypass Key when you can't refuse garden visitor because it has a good item "**LSHIFT**"
- Accept a visitor "**K**"
- Teleport to the nearest plot with pasts on it "**V**"
- Warp to Trevor's Den or accept the quest from him when on Mushroom Desert "**V**"
- Reputation Helper on Crimson Isle "**H**"
- Warp to nearest warp place in hub when doing Diana's Mythological event "**V**"
- Share a Inquisitor Waypoint to your party "**Y**"
- Lover the sensitivity of the mouse "**Z**"
- Breakdown Hotkey, show a breakdown of all fortune sources on a tool. (LShift)
- Bypass Key when you can't refuse garden visitor because it has a good item "LControl"
- Campfire Hotkey to warp to the campfire if you don't have travel scroll unlocked, show path to the camfire. "V"
- Hotkey to select the next spot "z"
- Share a Mineshaft location "Y"
- Reset Fishing timer manually "R"
- Wiki Key, Show get a link in chat for the wiki for the item you mouse is hovering over "O"


### Partly Sane Skies

- Party Manager "**P**"
- Refill items to run dungeons from seak (including Spirit Leaps and Superboom Tnt) "**O**"

### PolySprint

- Toggle Sneak Mouse "**Button 5**"

### SkyGuide

- Open map "**M**"

### Dungeons Guide

- refresh or create pathfind line "**R**"
- Toggle pathfind lines "**I**"
- Bood Rush mode "**J**"
- Find new Secret "**F**" (Useful when a secret is bugged or already taken.)
- Bomb Defuse sends solutions in chat and displays them "**Z**"

### Chatting

- Chat Peek "**X**" (It toggles by default can be changed)

### Fancy Warp Menu 

- Show the warp menu "CAPITAL"

### Skytils

- Noting by default but you can create everything you want with the help of the key Shortcuts.

</details>


<details>
<summary>🛠️Troubleshooting</summary>

Visit the GitHub wiki for guides and basic troubleshooting help. [GitHub Wiki](https://github.com/KdGaming0/SkyBlock-Enhanced-Modpack/wiki#overview)

Find an issue, start an issue on the [GitHub.](https://github.com/KdGaming0/SkyBlock-Enhanced-Modpack/issues)
Need help, start a discussion on my [Github](https://github.com/KdGaming0/SkyBlock-Enhanced-Modpack/discussions) and I will help you!

Start an issue if you find a bug or something doesn't work, and start a discussion if you just need help with something.

### What performance can I expect from the pack?

**On my PC with a Ryzen 5800x and RX 6700XT Mid/High-end, I get**
- Hub spawn = 100 to 200 when I lock away from the spawn 350 +
- Garden = 400 to 600 FPS
- Home island = 100 to 150 with a lot of chests.
- Generally around Skyblock = 150 to 250 FPS

**On my Laptop with a Ryzen 5800U Low-end, I get**
- Hub spawn = 50  to 60 FPS, small lobby.
- Garden = 100 to 130 FPS
- Home island = 70 to 80 FPS, a lot of chests.
- Generally around SkyBLock = 60 to 100, rarely below 60, most of the time around 80

**On my new Laptop with a Ryzen 7440 Low/Mid-end, I get**
- Hub spawn = 60  to 75 FPS, small lobby.
- Garden = 100 to 300 FPS
- Home island = 70 to 180 FPS, a lot of cheats.
- Generally around SkyBLock = 90 to 200

### My game crashes on start

1. Try to start the game again. If it doesn't work, please make an issue on the GitHub page.
2. If this crash happened after updating the pack, try this: Navigating to the `essential` directory in your instance folder (this can be found by clicking the 3 dots in the top right corner and clicking open folder) and removing the `loader` folder. If this doesn't work, please open an issue on GitHub.


</details>

---

### 🪶 Features List

Explore the endless possibilities of my mod pack and the future of every included mod by browsing the extensive list of mods and their respective features.

<details>
<summary>🌟Not Enough Updates</summary>

### NotEnoughUpdates(NEU), a must-have mod for Hypixel Skyblock.

  <details>
  <summary>Really Usful</summary>
  
- An item list containing information and recipes about every item in Skyblock pluss information of where the item is dropped and the drop change.

<details>
<summary>Showcase</summary>
  
![A Picture of how the information and recipes GUI looks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b1254ec112db3f9d4a5e1e68557c66decec13d2.png)

![A Picture of how the information GUI looks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/210e0265052121dda09db417359a3fe0d11bcbca.png)

![A Picture of how the recipes GUI looks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/908c07d9a2f6141a6cf4c36aceecdaf4096da7e3.png)
  
</details>

- An in-game skyblock profile viewer accessed with /pv [player].

<details>
<summary>Showcase</summary>

![Showcasing how the GUI of the profile viewer locks.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6dd3b6bc83a2490d2cbe569d44f960034e96a068.png)

 </details>

  </details>

  <details>
  <summary>GUI Elements</summary>

- Dungeon loot profit checker.
 
<details>
<summary>Showcase</summary>

![A Picture Of the Dungeon loot profit checker GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab3e3b1e182aa66cb30c3b0e3dbb15aa559f6d4e.png)

</details>

- Onscreen overlays for: Farming, Dwarven Mines, Pets, and the Accessory bag.

<details>
<summary>Showcase</summary>

![Showcase of GUI element Pets.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1dd7d976c89ebb1868aa909207e08cc1e3794bb.png)
![Showcase of GUI element Accessory bag.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f7f2aec345aa653116c8b0dc4b82fb6e1eab3a1.png)
![Showcase of GUI element Accessory Dwarven Mines.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad1d385f49c955840ddd70ffd537145de6cb423e.png)
![Showcase of GUI element Farming.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4758176947f4086011d9dc783dd4c0773884d0d.png)

</details>

- A custom Action House and Bazaar Search GUI.
- A custom storage GUI, off by default.
- A custom enchanting table GUI.
- A custom price Graph to see the Price history of items, press key P when holding the mouse pointer over.

<details>

  <details>
  <summary>📃SkyblockAddons</summary>

SkyblockAddons or SBA as most people call it, is a Quality of Life mod for Hypixel Skyblock and one of the oldest Skyblock mods.

- Freeze backpack previews.
- Zealot counters a lot of different counters for your Zealot grind.
- Hiding players near NPCs
- A customizable hotbar allowing for heart and mana bars, as well as the removal of food, armor bars, and more.

  <details>
  <summary>📝Dungeons Guide</summary>

Dungeons Guide is a super-intelligent dungeon mod that helps you find secrets and do it fast.

### The big one: Secret Finder creates a line from the player towards the nearest secret.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/fhfNU13wjq0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  <details>
<summary>Solvers</summary>

- F7 Terminal Solvers (Shows the correct solution/order.)
- Creeper Solver (Shows what sea lanterns to hit.)
- Simon Says Solver (Shows correct buttons to hit.)
- Blaze Room Solver (Shows what order to kill the blazes in.)
- Advanced Water Board Solver (Shows you what buttons to hit.)
- Tic-Tac-Toe Solver (Shows the correct tic-tac-toe solution.)
- Riddle Solver (Tells you the correct person, requires you to click all three characters first.)
- Ice Fill Solver (Shows the correct path through the ice puzzle.)
- Silverfish Solver (Shows what way you should hit the silverfish.)
- Bomb Defuse Solver (Shows the path through the pressure plates. Requires you to visit the left side and press a key to save the solution first, Required to be this way to follow Hypixel rules.)
- Fairy Soul Finder (Shows the location of dungeon fairy souls.)


<details>
<summary>Showcase of some of them</summary>

Not comming soon

</details>

  </details>


  <details>
<summary>QOL Features</summary>

- Secrets Chest Close (Hit any key while in a secret chest to close it.)
- Spirit Boots Fixer (Fixes spirit boots changing your hand to air.)
- Blood Room Warning (Shows dungeon progress and if you should enter the boss arena or not.)
- Box Secret Bats (Creates a box around secret bats to make them easier to find, does not change their hitbox.)
- Box Real Livid (Creates a coloured box around the real Livid.)
- Box Skeleton Masters (Places a box around skeleton masters to make them easier to see.)
- Highlight Starred Mobs (Highlight starred mobs to make them easier to spot and kill.)
- Dungeon Map (See the layout of a dungeon, room progress, other players positions and the total secrets in each room.)
- Spirit Bear Summon Percentage (Shows how close the spirit bear is to spawning.)
- Custom Party Finder GUI (A nicer party finder GUI.)

<details>
<summary>Showcase of some of them</summary>

</details>

  </details>

And a lot more QoL stuff visit their [GitHub for more info.](https://github.com/Dungeons-Guide/Skyblock-Dungeons-Guide)

  </details>

   <details>
   <summary>🚀Make the game smoooot, less buggy and a lot more FPS</summary>

<details>
<summary>PolyPatcher</summary>

### PolyPatcher, a lot of fixes

<details>
<summary>Bug Fixs</summary>

- Parallax Fix - Resolve the camera being too far back, seemingly making your eyes be in the back of your head.
- Culling Fix - Resolve false negatives in frustum culling, creating invisible chunks in some cases.
- Alex Arm Position - Resolve Alex-model arms being shifted down further than Steve-model arms.
- Resource Exploit Fix - Resolve an exploit in 1.8 allowing servers to look through directories.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Screenshots</summary>

- Favorite Screenshot - Show a text component that allows you to delete a screenshot.
- Delete Screenshot - Show a text component that allows you to delete.
- Upload Screenshot - Show a text component that allows you to upload a screenshot to Imgur.
- Copy Screenshot - Show a text component that allows you to copy a screenshot. *default
- Open Screenshots Folder - Show a text component that allows you to open the screenshots folder.
- A Screenshot Manager - Lat's you upload screenshot to Imgur, copying to clipboard, etc.
- Screenshot Preview - Preview the look of your screenshot when taken in the bottom right corner.

</details>

And a lot more.

- 1.11 Chat Length, you can type longer chat messages.
- Compact Chat, stack duplicate messages.
- And more stuff to make the chat and other things feel better.
- And stuff that gives you more FPS.

For a full list vist PolyPatcher [Modrinth site.](https://modrinth.com/mod/patcher)


</details>

<details>
<summary>TexFix</summary>

- Improve memory usage when playing with big texture packs.

For more info about how it works visit their [Curseforge page.](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/texfix)

</details>

<details>
<summary>FoamFix</summary>

- Improve memory usage when playing with many mods.

For more info about how it works visit their [Modrinth page.](https://modrinth.com/mod/foamfix)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Entity Culling</summary>

- Using async path-tracing to skip rendering Block/Entities that are not visible.

For more info visit their [Modrinth page.](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Velox Caelo</summary>

- This mod caches some CIT calculations in optifine. To make this mod work at all, you need OptiFine and Forge installed.

- The best performance improvement is achieved if you have texture packs with a lot of custom textures.


Visit their [Modrinth page for more info](https://modrinth.com/mod/veloxcaelo)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Phosphor Legacy Forge</summary>

- Phosphor is a Minecraft mod that works to optimize one of the game's most inefficient areas-- the lighting engine.
- With Phosphor, the amount of time the game takes to generate new chunks can be greatly reduced, and you can expect to see some of the nastier frame stutters caused by loading chunks on the client simply vanish.

Visit their [Modreith page for more info.](https://modrinth.com/mod/phosphorlegacyforge)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Polished GUI</summary>

- Faster language loading.
- Various layout/inconsistency fixes for GUI.
- More seamless and streamlined experience with improved GUI widgets.

Visit their [Modreith page for more info.](https://modrinth.com/mod/polished-gui)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Redirectionor</summary>

- Optimises the game to advance for my understanding but it should give more fps.

Visit their [curseforge site for more info](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/redirectionor-retro)

</details>

<details>
<summary>OptiFine</summary>

- A LOT More FPS

[Visit OptiFine website to download](https://optifine.net/home) ("This is not a part of the pack and needs to be downloaded manually. Instructions are at the top.")

</details>

</details>

   </details>

Other things it dos
- In-Game Messenger: Add your friends and message them across worlds and servers, all in-game.
- Wardrobe: Dress up your character with many different cosmetics, some even for free. You can also switch your skin and save multiple outfits. 
- Screenshot Browser: Essential features fully updated screenshot experience. Take, favorite, edit, and share screenshots from in-game, easier than ever before.

Visit their [Modrinth page for more info.](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)

  <details>
<summary>Hypixel Plus</summary>

### Hypixel Plus retextures all of Skyblock items.
A resource pack for the Hypixel Server that textures all of SkyBlock items with a vanilla style. Never lose an item because it locks the same.

- Visit their Modrinth page for more [info.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hypixel-plus/gallery)

  </details>

  <details>

Get rid of the old 16x 1.8.9 textures and hello to the new 32x 1.20 textures.

- Visit their Modrinth page for more [info.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x)

  <summary>🌤️Partly Sane Skies</summary>

### Partly Sane Skies A Quality of Life SkyBlock Mod

- Custom Main Menu

<details>
<summary>Showcase</summary>

![Picture of the Custom Main Menu with a butiful picture of the skyblock hub.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66877cfc0b94caeb26c51fc0a40f3cd9ddeda938.png)

</details>

- A Party Manager for your Dungeon runs.

<details>
<summary>Showcase</summary>

![Picture of how the GUI for the party Manager for your Dungeon runs loks.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f8d9b1cd27e8d7dcb67fdce4ec9449a844ba546.png)

</details>

- Custom Sounds for SkyBlock. Instead of the normal noteblocks, there is now the option to use computer-generated, discord sounds or even live instruments to play sounds such as SkyBlock music and sound effects.
- Pet for Minion Information Display

<details>
<summary>Showcase</summary>

![Pizture of GUI element Showing Pet to use for Minion when minion GUI is open](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c986deb79ddfec9ff22faba23a0fe281f2a6e18.png)

</details>

- Top Crops to Compost
- Best Skymart Profit
- Visitors Logbook Stats
- Garden Shop Trade Cost

This is disabled because we use Skyhanni instead, which is much better.

<details>
<summary>Showcase</summary>

</details>

- Mining Events Reminder. The mining events reminder has a selective list of all dwarven mines & crystal hollows events.
- Pickaxe Ability Reminder
- No Cookie Warning every 60 seconds if you have more than two million on you. Configure in the config menu with F7.

<details>

- Best Bit Shop Profit
- Best Minion Profit Calculator /mc

<details>
<summary>Easy Configs</summary>

- Let me ship default settings to you but you don't have to worry about your settings being overwritten on an update of the pack.
- Also lets you change between different saves of settings and export and import your settings to share with friends.

For more info about how it works visit my [Modrinth page.](https://modrinth.com/mod/easyconfigs)

</details>

</details>
